name: WASM Terminal
description: An xterm.js terminal connected to a WASM Linux VM with board filesystem access and network. Can run Claude Code or other CLI tools.

tools.name: channel-wasm-terminal.sendToTerminal
tools.description: Inject text into the terminal as if typed by the user.

text.description: Text to type into the terminal.

tools.name: channel-wasm-terminal.onTerminalOutput
tools.description: Subscribe to terminal output. Board modules can use this to monitor what the terminal produces.

callback.description: Callback function ID for output events.
